title: ampelopsis brevipedunculata var. hancei
intro: Ampelopsis brevipedunculata var. hancei, also known as Chinese ivy or Hance's grape ivy, is a type of plant that belongs to the grape family (Vitaceae) and is native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ampelopsis brevipedunculata var. hancei include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing respiratory issues, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in the production of extracts and capsules.
